forceWithdraw(address,uint256,uint128,by.details: Called by anyone after dripsForceWithdraw creates pending state

invest(uint256,bytes).details: For simplicity, this version provides SINGLE-SIDED liquidity (no swaps needed)Full-range positions work best for this approach

params.strategyData: Encoded parameters (poolId, token0, token1, tickLower, tickUpper, isToken0, fee, tickSpacing)

params.amount: Amount to withdraw (used to calculate proportional liquidity)

returns.withdrawn: Actual amount withdrawn in original deposit token

forceWithdraw(address,uint256,uint128,by.notice: Force withdraw - consumes withdrawal state from force collect flow

invest(uint256,bytes).notice: Invest - provide liquidity to Uniswap V4

withdraw(bytes,uint256,bytes).notice: Withdraw - remove liquidity from Uniswap V4
